summary: Tested Historical Profit Analysis and Chunked Upload features. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - Profit tab in Visualization page shows all 5 views (Yearly, Customer, Supplier, Item, Month) with charts, tables, pagination, and search functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Historical profit endpoint handles ~211k records efficiently
All 5 views (yearly, customer, supplier, item, month) return proper data structure
Chunked upload init stores metadata in MongoDB upload_sessions collection
Upload status correctly returns 404 for non-existent sessions
Dashboard stats (GET /api/stats) correctly excludes historical_transactions data (shows 3989 vs 200k+)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Historical profit analysis fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/analytics/historical-profit?year=2025&view={yearly|customer|supplier|item|month}. Chunked upload uses MongoDB-backed storage (upload_sessions and upload_chunks collections). Dashboard stats exclude historical_transactions collection.

frontend_ui.profit_tab_in_visualization: PASSED - Located under Data Visualization page
frontend_ui.yearly_summary_cards: PASSED - 6 cards with Silver Profit, Labour Profit, Total Sold, Transactions Matched, Sale Records, Purchase Records
frontend_ui.customer_wise_view: PASSED - Bar chart + sortable table with pagination (5966 customers)
frontend_ui.supplier_wise_view: PASSED - Bar chart + table with Purchased(kg) and Items count
frontend_ui.item_wise_view: PASSED - Bar chart + table with Buy Tunch and Sell Tunch columns
frontend_ui.month_wise_view: PASSED - Two charts (bar + line) + data table
frontend_ui.pagination: PASSED - Prev/Next buttons, shows 'Showing X-Y of Z'
frontend_ui.search_filter: PASSED - data-testid='hp-search' filters table in Customer/Supplier/Item views
